label: tatsaechliches_Lieferdatum
description: When curating details for an Invoice record, you must specify exactly one actual delivery date formatted as a text string. Providing this single required date is critical to the integrity of the record, as failing to include it will trigger a system error indicating that the required DTM+35 segment is missing or extra from the data.

label: LaengeDatumAuftragsnummerLieferantKopf
description: When curating details for an Invoice record, strict formatting rules apply to the date of the supplier's order number. To ensure the header information remains valid and specifically to prevent the RFF+VN segment from being too long, this date must be recorded as a text string and cannot exceed a maximum length of eight characters.

label: Dokumentenname
description: When curating details for an Invoice record, you must specify exactly one document type as a text string. This classification is strictly limited to one of the following accepted values: Commercial invoice, Credit advice, Value credit, Value debit, Handelsrechnung, Gutschriftsanzeige, Wertgutschrift, or Wertbelastung.

label: LaengeBelegnummer
description: When defining details for an Invoice record, the associated document number must be formatted as a text string strictly limited to a maximum of twelve characters. Enforcing this character limit is crucial for maintaining data integrity, as exceeding it will trigger a system validation error indicating that data element 1004 within the BGM segment is too long.

label: Belegdatum
description: For any detail record of an Invoice, the data model requires exactly one document date provided as a text string. Providing this single required date is mandatory, as its absence directly indicates that the critical DTM+137 segment is missing or extra from the transaction.

label: LaengeAuftragsnummerLieferantKopf
description: For any details of an Invoice record, the supplier's order number located in the header must be recorded as a standard text string. To ensure proper data formatting and prevent the entry from being too long, this specific reference, commonly known as RFF+VN, is strictly limited to a maximum length of 35 characters.

label: ExistenzAuftragsnummerLieferantKopf
description: When structuring details for an Invoice record, the data model strictly requires the inclusion of exactly one supplier order number formatted as a text string. Enforcing this single required value ensures that the critical RFF+VN reference is properly captured, preventing data quality issues where the supplier order number is left missing or extra from the document header.

label: ExistenzDatumAuftragsnummerLieferantKopf
description: When defining Invoice Details, you must specify exactly one date for the supplier's order number. This required value must be recorded as a standard text string. Because this is a strict header-level requirement, failing to provide this single date will trigger a validation error indicating that the date of the supplier's order number, specifically the RFF+VN reference, is missing from the header.

label: ExistenzBelegnummer
description: When defining details for an Invoice record, you must specify exactly one document number formatted as a text string. Providing this single required value is strictly enforced to maintain data integrity, as omitting it will trigger a validation error indicating that Data element 1004 is missing or extra in the BGM segment.

label: Dokumentfunktion
description: When defining details for an Invoice record, you must specify exactly one document function, which serves as the specification for Data element 1225 in the BGM segment. This mandatory classification must be provided as a text string and is strictly limited to one of the following approved English or German terms: Cancellation, Replacement, Duplicate, Original, Copy, Additional transfer, Stornierung, Ersatz, Duplikat, Original, Kopie, or Zusaetzliche Uebertragung.

label: LaengeDatumAuftragsnummerKaeuferKopf
description: When curating details for an Invoice record, strict attention must be paid to the date associated with the order number in the document header. This specific date value must be provided as a text string and is strictly limited to a maximum length of eight characters. Enforcing this exact character limit ensures proper data formatting and prevents system validation errors that would otherwise flag the order reference date, commonly known as RFF+ON, as being too long.

label: ExistenzAuftragsnummerKaeuferKopf
description: When defining details of an Invoice record, you must specify exactly one buyer order number formatted as a text string. Enforcing this single required text value ensures that the document header contains the necessary reference information, specifically the order number commonly identified as RFF+ON, and failing to provide it will trigger a validation error indicating that the supplier's order number is missing or extra from the header.

label: ExistenzKaeufer
description: When curating an electronic invoice, the data model mandates the inclusion of exactly one buyer. A single buyer entity must be explicitly specified for the record to be valid, and failing to provide this required information will result in a validation error indicating that the essential NAD+BY segment is missing or extra.

label: LaengeAuftragsnummerKaeuferKopf
description: When curating details for an Invoice record, any provided buyer order number must be formatted as a standard text string. To ensure proper header referencing and prevent validation errors stating that the RFF+ON order number is too long, this text value is strictly limited to a maximum of thirty-five characters.

label: ExistenzDatumAuftragsnummerKaeuferKopf
description: When curating details for an Invoice record, it is mandatory to provide exactly one date for the buyer's order number. This required value must be formatted as a standard text string.

label: ExistenzLieferscheinnummer
description: When curating details for an Invoice record, it is mandatory to include exactly one delivery note number formatted as a text string. Providing this single required value is critical for proper document tracking, as omitting it will trigger a validation error indicating that the supplier's order number, specifically the EDIFACT RFF+DQ segment, is missing from the data.

label: FormalNameKaeufer
description: When curating a Formal Organization record, a conditional rule applies based on its business role. If the organization is specifically designated as a Buyer, it must include exactly one formal name. This formal name must be provided as a text string and is strictly limited to a maximum length of 35 characters. Enforcing this requirement guarantees that the buyer's formal name is properly specified, directly preventing the omission of data element 3036 for the NAD+BY segment in the underlying business data. We only check this when the entity is designated as a Buyer—otherwise, it is not relevant.

label: LaengeLieferscheinnummer
description: For any Invoice Details, the delivery note number must be formatted as a standard text string. Because this field represents the supplier's order number, specifically the RFF+DQ reference, it is strictly limited in size to prevent system errors where the value is too long. Therefore, the provided text must never exceed a maximum length of 35 characters.

label: ExistenzDatumLieferscheinnummer
description: When curating details for an Invoice record, you must specify exactly one date associated with the delivery note number. This mandatory date must be formatted as a text string. It is critical to include this single required value, as its absence will trigger a system alert stating that the date of the supplier's order number, specifically the RFF+DQ reference, is missing from the document.

label: LaengeDatumLieferscheinnummer
description: For any details of an Invoice record, the date associated with the delivery note number must be recorded as a text string that does not exceed eight characters in length. Enforcing this strict character limit ensures data quality and prevents validation errors indicating that the date of the supplier's order number, specifically the RFF+DQ reference, is too long.

label: GLNKaeufer
description: When defining a Formal Organization, specific data curation rules apply based on the entity's role. If the organization is categorized as a Buyer, it must be assigned exactly one Global Location Number. To ensure data integrity and prevent system errors indicating that data element 3039 is missing for the NAD+BY segment, this location number must be formatted as a numeric integer that is exactly thirteen digits in length. Alternatively, if the organization is not designated with a Buyer role, this strict location number requirement does not apply.

label: UmsatzsteuernummerKaeufer
description: When defining a Formal Organization, strict data rules govern the presence of tax information based on the entity's function. If the organization is classified specifically as a Buyer Role, it is mandatory to provide exactly one VAT identifier, and this value must not exceed fourteen characters in length. The validation logic dictates that the organization must either not be categorized as a buyer at all, or it must fulfill this exact VAT identifier requirement. Failure to provide this required data for a buyer will trigger a system alert stating that the buyer's VAT number is missing from the record. Alternatively, if the organization is not designated with a Buyer role, this strict VAT identifier requirement does not apply.

label: LandKaeufer
description: When defining a Formal Organization, specific data requirements apply based on the entity's role. If the organization is designated as a Buyer, it must include exactly one country code to properly indicate the buyer's location. This country code must be provided as a text string and cannot exceed three characters in length. If the organization does not hold the buyer role, this specific geographic constraint is waived. Enforcing this rule ensures that the required indication of the buyer's country is present, preventing compliance errors where data element 3207 is missing for the NAD+BY segment.

label: StadtKaeufer
description: When curating a Formal Organization record, conditional logic dictates how its location data must be handled based on its assigned role. Specifically, if the organization is designated with a Buyer Role, it is strictly required to provide exactly one city specification to identify the buyer's city, which prevents missing data errors for element 3164 in the NAD+BY segment. This mandatory city value must be formatted as a standard text string and cannot exceed a maximum length of 35 characters. If the organization is not classified under a Buyer Role, it is entirely exempt from this specific city requirement.

label: PLZKaeufer
description: When curating records for a Formal Organization, specific validation rules apply to ensure the proper specification of a buyer's postal code. If the organization is explicitly designated with a Buyer Role, the record must include exactly one postal code formatted as a text string with a maximum length of nine characters. If the organization does not function as a buyer, this postal code constraint does not apply. Enforcing this rule ensures that data element 3251 is correctly populated for the NAD+BY segment, and any omission for a recognized buyer will be flagged as a missing postal code error.

label: UmsatzsteuernummerLieferant
description: When curating a Formal Organization record, a conditional requirement applies regarding its tax details based on its business function. If the organization is designated with a supplier role, it is strictly required to provide exactly one VAT identifier to prevent errors related to missing supplier tax specifications. To ensure proper data formatting, this required VAT identifier must not exceed a maximum length of fourteen characters. Organizations that are not classified as suppliers are entirely exempt from this specific validation rule.

label: FormalNameLieferant
description: When defining a Formal Organization within the data model, specific curation rules apply to ensure the proper identification of suppliers, specifically addressing the requirement for data element 3036 in the NAD+SU segment. If the organization is categorized under a Supplier Role, it is strictly required to include exactly one formal name. This formal name must be provided as a standard text string and cannot exceed a maximum length of 35 characters. If the organization is not designated as a supplier, it is exempt from this specific naming constraint.

label: StrasseKaeufer
description: When curating a Formal Organization record, specific validation rules apply to the buyer's street address, referenced as data element 3042 within the NAD+BY segment. The system enforces a conditional requirement based on the organization's classification. If the organization is explicitly designated as acting in a Buyer role, it is strictly required to provide exactly one street address. This address must be formatted as a standard text string and cannot exceed a maximum length of 35 characters. Alternatively, if the organization is not categorized as a buyer, it is exempt from this specific street address constraint.

label: GLNLieferant
description: When defining a Formal Organization within the system, specific validation rules apply to ensure proper supplier identification. If the organization is designated with a supplier role, it is strictly required to provide exactly one Global Location Number. To ensure data integrity and prevent missing data element errors regarding the supplier specification segment, this location number must be formatted as an integer that is exactly thirteen digits in length. If the organization is not classified as a supplier, it is exempt from this requirement, but failing to provide this exact thirteen-digit identifier when acting as a supplier will trigger a validation error indicating that the required supplier location data is missing.

label: StrasseLieferant
description: When defining a Formal Organization, specific data entry rules apply based on the organization's designated role. If the organization is categorized specifically as a supplier, it must include exactly one street address formatted as a text string that does not exceed 35 characters in length. This conditional requirement ensures proper record completeness, as omitting this information will trigger a validation error indicating that data element 3042 is missing for the NAD+SU segment, which strictly mandates the specification of the supplier's street. However, if the formal organization is not classified under the supplier role, it is entirely exempt from this specific street address constraint.

label: StadtLieferant
description: When curating a Formal Organization record, conditional validation applies based on the entity's role. Specifically, if the organization is classified under a Supplier Role, it must include exactly one city specification to satisfy the EDIFACT NAD+SU segment requirements. This city value must be formatted as a standard text string and cannot exceed a maximum length of 35 characters. Alternatively, if the organization is not designated as a supplier, it is exempt from this rule. Violating this constraint will flag the record with an error stating that data element 3164, representing the specification of the city of the supplier, is missing.

label: LandLieferant
description: When curating a Formal Organization record, conditional validation applies based on the entity's role. Specifically, if the organization is designated as a supplier, it must include exactly one country code. This code must be provided as a text string with a maximum length of three characters. Adhering to this constraint ensures the proper specification of the supplier's country, preventing system errors that would otherwise indicate data element 3207 is missing for the NAD+SU segment. We only check this when the entity is designated as a Supplier—otherwise, it is not relevant.

label: UmsatzsteuernummerRechnungsempfaenger
description: When defining a Formal Organization, strict data rules govern the inclusion of tax information based on the organization's specific role. If the organization is classified as an invoice recipient, it must be assigned exactly one VAT identifier to ensure the required tax reference segments are properly populated and not missing. This mandatory VAT identifier must be formatted as a value no longer than fourteen characters. Alternatively, if the organization does not serve as the invoice recipient, it is entirely exempt from this specific VAT identifier requirement.

label: PLZLieferant
description: When curating a Formal Organization record, specific constraints apply depending on its designated role. If the organization is explicitly categorized as a supplier, it is strictly required to provide exactly one postal code to satisfy the business requirement for data element 3251 within the NAD+SU segment. This supplier postal code must be recorded as a text string and cannot exceed a maximum length of nine characters. Alternatively, if the organization does not hold the supplier role, this specific postal code requirement does not apply.

label: GLNRechnungsempfaenger
description: When curating records for a Formal Organization, specific validation rules apply based on the entity's designated role. If the organization is classified as an invoice recipient, it is strictly required to provide exactly one Global Location Number to satisfy the requirements for data element 3039 within the NAD+IV segment. This location identifier must be formatted as a single integer that is exactly thirteen digits in length. If the organization does not serve in the invoice recipient role, this specific Global Location Number constraint does not apply, but failing to provide this thirteen-digit numeric identifier for an actual invoice recipient will result in a validation error indicating that the required specification is missing.

label: FormalNameRechnungsempfaenger
description: When defining a Formal Organization, specific data curation rules apply depending on its designated role. If the organization is categorized specifically as an invoice recipient, it must include exactly one formal name to ensure the required data element for the invoice recipient segment is properly specified and not missing. This formal name must be provided as a standard text string and is strictly limited to a maximum length of thirty-five characters. If the organization does not act in the capacity of an invoice recipient, it is exempt from this specific formal name requirement.

label: StrasseRechnungsempfaenger
description: When defining a Formal Organization, specific data curation rules apply to ensure the proper specification of the invoice recipient's street address, which corresponds to Data element 3042 for Segment NAD+IV. The system evaluates the role of the organization to determine the exact address requirements. Specifically, if the organization is designated with an Invoicee Role, it is strictly required to provide exactly one street address. This mandatory address must be formatted as a standard text string and cannot exceed a maximum length of 35 characters. Alternatively, if the organization is not categorized as an invoice recipient, it is exempt from this specific street address constraint, satisfying the rule's logical conditions.

label: StadtRechnungsempfaenger
description: When defining a Formal Organization, specific data curation rules apply to ensure the proper specification of the invoice recipient's city, which corresponds to data element 3164 for the NAD+IV segment. The validation logic dictates a conditional requirement based on the organization's specific role. If the organization is designated as an invoice recipient, it must provide exactly one city. This city value must be formatted as a standard text string and is strictly limited to a maximum length of thirty-five characters. Alternatively, if the organization does not hold the invoice recipient role, it is entirely exempt from this condition, ensuring that validation errors only trigger when the city data is genuinely missing for an actual invoicee.

label: PLZRechnungsempfaenger
description: When defining a Formal Organization, specific data curation rules apply based on the entity's designated role. If the organization is categorized specifically as an invoice recipient, it must be assigned exactly one postal code. This postal code must be recorded as a text string and cannot exceed a maximum length of nine characters. Organizations that do not act in the capacity of an invoice recipient are exempt from this strict requirement. However, for those that do, failing to provide this single required postal code will trigger a validation error stating that data element 3251 is missing for the NAD+IV segment, which mandates the specification of the invoice recipient's postal code.

label: UmsatzsteuernummerLieferanschrift
description: When defining a Formal Organization, specific data requirements apply depending on the organization's designated role within the transaction. If the organization is categorized as a Delivery Party Role, it must be assigned exactly one VAT identifier to properly record the tax number of the delivery address. This required VAT identifier is strictly limited to a maximum length of fourteen characters. Alternatively, if the organization is not acting as a delivery party, it is exempt from this specific requirement. Violating this rule indicates a critical business error where the VAT number for the delivery address is missing from the record.

label: StadtLieferanschrift
description: When curating a Formal Organization record, specific validation rules apply to its address details based on its designated role. If the organization is classified as a Delivery Party Role, it must include exactly one city specification for the delivery address to ensure compliance with data element 3164 of the NAD+DP segment. This required city value must be provided as a standard text string and is strictly limited to a maximum length of 35 characters. If the organization does not serve as a delivery party, it is exempt from this specific city requirement.

label: StrasseLieferanschrift
description: When defining a Formal Organization, strict data rules apply to the specification of the delivery address street, known in the system as data element 3042 for the NAD+DP segment. The record must satisfy one of two conditions regarding its role and location. Either the organization is not categorized as a Delivery Party Role, or, if it does serve as a delivery party, it must specify exactly one street address. This required street address must be formatted as a text string and cannot exceed 35 characters in length, ensuring that the delivery location is accurately captured and never missing from the segment.

label: PLZLieferanschrift
description: When defining a Formal Organization, a specific conditional rule applies regarding its designated role. If the organization is categorized as a delivery party, it is strictly required to provide exactly one postal code to specify the delivery address. This postal code must be formatted as a text string and cannot exceed nine characters in length. If an organization acts as a delivery party but fails to include this information, it will trigger a validation error indicating that data element 3251 is missing for the NAD+DP segment, which mandates the specification of the delivery address postal code. Organizations that do not serve as a delivery party are entirely exempt from this specific postal code requirement.

label: GLNLieferanschrift
description: When defining a Formal Organization, specific validation rules apply to ensure the proper specification of delivery addresses. If the organization is designated with a Delivery Party role, it is strictly required to provide exactly one Global Location Number. Failing to provide this identifier will result in a missing data element error specifically for the NAD+DP segment. To be considered valid, this Global Location Number must be formatted as a single integer that is exactly thirteen digits in length. However, if the organization is not acting in the capacity of a delivery party, this strict location number constraint is waived and the system will not require the thirteen-digit identifier.

label: LandLieferanschrift
description: When defining a Formal Organization, specific rules apply to the country specification of the delivery address. If the organization is designated with a Delivery Party role, it is strictly required to provide exactly one country code to satisfy data element 3207. This country code must be formatted as a text string and cannot exceed three characters in length. If the organization does not act as a Delivery Party, it is exempt from this specific country code requirement.

label: FormalNameLieferanschrift
description: When defining a Formal Organization, strict data rules apply to ensure the delivery address is properly identified. Specifically, if the organization is categorized as a Delivery Party Role, it must include exactly one formal name. This formal name must be provided as a text string and is limited to a maximum length of 35 characters. Enforcing this rule guarantees that the formal name of the delivery address, which corresponds to data element 3036 for the NAD+DP segment, is never missing from the record. If the organization does not act as a delivery party, this specific formal name requirement is bypassed.

label: LandRechnungsempfaenger
description: When defining a Formal Organization, a conditional data curation rule applies based on its designated role. If the organization is categorized specifically as an invoice recipient, it must include exactly one country code to satisfy the requirement for Data Element 3207 in Segment NAD+IV. This country code must be provided as a text string and cannot exceed three characters in length. Alternatively, if the organization does not hold the invoice recipient role, it is exempt from this specific country code constraint.

label: ExistenzAuftragsnummerLieferantArtikel
description: When defining an Item record, the data model strictly requires the inclusion of exactly one supplier order number formatted as a text string. This mandatory requirement ensures that the supplier specific reference, commonly known as RFF+VN, is always present within the item details, preventing critical missing data errors during processing.

label: Waehrung
description: When defining details for an Invoice, the record must specify exactly one currency formatted as a text string. This single currency value is a strictly required element, as failing to provide it indicates that the critical CUX segment is missing from the invoice header.

label: ArtikelNettopreis
description: When defining an item record, you must provide exactly one net price for the individual article. This mandatory value is required to fulfill the PRI+AAA segment, ensuring the item's net price is explicitly indicated. The price itself must be formatted as a decimal number and is strictly limited to a maximum length of thirteen characters.

label: ArtikelBruttopreis
description: For any item record, the data model requires exactly one gross price to be specified. This value must be formatted as a floating-point number and is strictly limited to a maximum length of thirteen characters. Providing this specific data point is mandatory to prevent the omission of the PRI+AAB segment, which the system relies on as the essential indication of the net price for an individual article.

label: ExistenzDatumAuftragsnummerLieferantArtikel
description: When defining an item record, you must provide exactly one date for the supplier's order number, which must be recorded as a text string. This strict requirement ensures that the date associated with the supplier's order reference, specifically identified as RFF+VN, is never missing from the item portion of the document.

label: EANAtrikelnummer
description: When defining an Item record, strict identification rules apply to ensure that critical system segments are not missing, specifically the LIN segment for the EAN article number or the PIA segment for the supplier's article number. To satisfy this validation rule, the item must provide at least one of two acceptable text-based identifiers. It must either include a product identification explicitly set to the exact value of International Article Number, or alternatively, it must specify a supplier item number. Failing to provide at least one of these two identification methods will result in an invalid item record.

label: LaengeAuftragsnummerLieferantArtikel
description: When defining an item record, the supplier order number must be formatted as a standard text string. To maintain data integrity and avoid validation errors stating that the RFF+VN reference within the item part is too long, this order number is strictly limited to a maximum length of 35 characters.

label: ExistenzAuftragsnummerKaeuferArtikel
description: For an item record, the data curation guidelines mandate the inclusion of exactly one buyer order number, which must be provided as a text string. This strict requirement guarantees that the critical order reference, specifically identified as the RFF+ON order number for the supplier, is always present within the item part to prevent missing reference errors during processing.

label: LaengeAuftragsnummerKaeuferArtikel
description: When curating an item record, the buyer's order number must be recorded as a text string that strictly does not exceed 35 characters in length. Enforcing this character limit is crucial to prevent system validation errors, specifically ensuring that the associated RFF+ON order reference within the item section is not rejected during processing for being too long.

label: LaengeDatumAuftragsnummerKaeuferArtikel
description: When defining an item record, any recorded date for the buyer's order number must be formatted as a text string that does not exceed eight characters in length. Enforcing this strict character limit ensures proper data formatting and prevents validation errors that would otherwise flag the date of the supplier's order number, commonly referenced as RFF+ON within the item details, as being too long for the system to process.

label: ExistenzDatumAuftragsnummerKaeuferArtikel
description: When defining an item record, the data model strictly requires exactly one date associated with the buyer's order number. This single required value must be formatted as a text string. Providing this specific date is mandatory to ensure complete records and to prevent system errors indicating that the date of the supplier's order number, known as RFF+ON, is missing from the item part.

label: Rechnungsbetrag
description: When defining details for an Invoice record, you must specify exactly one invoice amount. This required value is strictly limited to a maximum length of 14 characters. It is critical to include this data point, as failing to provide it means the underlying MOA+77 segment is absent, which will trigger a system error stating that the invoice amount is missing.

label: BerechneteMenge
description: When defining an Item record, the data model strictly requires three specific numeric values to accurately capture calculated quantities and pricing.  The item must specify exactly one delivered quantity, formatted as a decimal number no longer than 15 characters, which serves as the specification of the calculated quantity typically found in the QTY+12 segment.   Additionally, the record must contain exactly one invoiced quantity, also restricted to a 15-character decimal number, to represent the calculated invoiced quantity from the QTY+47 segment.   Finally, to ensure accurate financial totals, the item must include exactly one line item amount, formatted as a decimal number up to 14 characters in length, which explicitly indicates the net position price derived from the MOA+203 segment.

label: LaengeDatumAuftragsnummerLieferantArtikel
description: When defining an Item record, specific attention must be given to the date of the supplier's order number, commonly identified within the item section as RFF+VN. To ensure proper data formatting and system compatibility, this date must be recorded as a text string and is strictly limited to a maximum length of eight characters.

label: ValutaDatum
description: When defining details for an Invoice record, you may provide a maximum of one value date. If included, this value date must be formatted as a text string and cannot exceed eight characters in length. This strict character limit ensures that the specified value date, which represents the DTM+209 segment, is not too long and conforms to the expected business data standards.

label: Gesamtpositionsbetrag
description: For curating details for an Invoice record, the data model requires exactly one total line item amount to be specified. This mandatory constraint ensures that the indication of the total position amount, traditionally represented by the MOA+79 segment, is never missing from the transaction data.

label: Zahlungsbedingung
description: For details of an Invoice record, the data model allows the inclusion of up to five payment conditions, which must be formatted as text strings. To maintain compliance with the expected values for data element 4279 in the PAT segment, specifically corresponding to codes 1 or 7, any specified payment condition must be strictly limited to one of the following accepted terms: "As usual", "Extended", "Wie ueblich", or "Verlaengert".

label: SteuerpflichtigerBetrag
description: When curating Details for an invoice, the data model requires the inclusion of exactly one taxable amount. It is mandatory to specify this single value, as its absence indicates that the required MOA+125 segment, which serves as the formal indication of the taxable amount, is missing from the record.

label: zusaetzlichePartneridentifikation
description: When curating a Formal Organization record, you may specify a maximum of one additional partner identification EAN code. If included, this identifier must be recorded as a text string with a strict limit of 35 characters. Ensuring this constraint is met is critical, as any violation indicates an incorrect RFF+API segment regarding the specification of the additional partner identification.

label: SummeZuAbschlaege
description: When defining details for an Invoice record, it is mandatory to provide exactly one entry for the total additions and deductions. This single required property ensures that the sums of all additions and deductions are accurately captured, corresponding to the MOA+131 segment. If this information is omitted, the system will flag an error indicating that the segment containing the sums of the additions and deductions is missing.

label: Abschlag
description: When defining an item record, you may specify up to fifteen allowance reasons. Each allowance reason must be provided as a valid, non-empty text string containing at least one character. Capturing this information is critical for defining the fee type specification, as failing to provide valid input here indicates that data element 7160 or 7161 is missing from the associated ALC segment.

label: RabattProzentsatz
description: When defining an item record, you may specify up to fifteen discount percentages. Each discount percentage must be recorded as a floating-point number containing between one and five characters. It is crucial to capture this information accurately, because omitting it or formatting it incorrectly triggers a system alert indicating that the percentage type and amount of the discount, specifically data elements 5245 or 5482, are missing from the PCD segment.

label: Zuschlag
description: When curating an Item record, you may specify the applicable surcharge types, commonly referred to as charge reasons. An item can have up to fifteen of these charge reasons associated with it. Whenever a charge reason is provided, it must be formatted as a valid text string containing at least one character to ensure the value is never left completely blank. Enforcing this strict text requirement guarantees that the specification for the surcharge type is properly captured, directly preventing critical business errors where data elements 7160 or 7161 are inadvertently left missing within the ALC segment.

label: BruttoendbetragRechnunng
description: When defining an item record, the gross final amount of the invoice must be indicated correctly to prevent errors in segments such as MOA+8, MOA+23, or MOA+204. To ensure this, the item must satisfy at least one of two strict formatting conditions regarding its financial adjustments. It must either restrict any allowance amounts to a maximum of two entries with neither exceeding thirteen characters in length, or it must apply these exact same limitations to its discount amounts, ensuring no more than two discount entries are provided and each is capped at thirteen characters.

label: Produktidentifikation
description: When defining an Item record, it is mandatory to provide at least one item name formatted as a text string. This requirement ensures the proper specification of the article name, directly corresponding to data element 7008 within the IMD segment, and failing to supply this required text value will flag the data element as incorrect.

label: ZuAbschlagbetrag
description: When defining an Item record, you must correctly specify the surcharge or discount amount to prevent validation errors related to the MOA+23 or MOA+204 segments. To meet this requirement, the item must satisfy at least one of two specific monetary adjustment conditions. It must either feature an allowance amount restricted to a maximum of two occurrences where each entry does not exceed eighteen characters in length, or alternatively, it must feature a discount amount that is similarly limited to no more than two occurrences of up to eighteen characters each.

label: AbschlagProzentsatz
description: When curating an Item record, any associated allowance percentages used to specify the type and amount of a discount must adhere to strict formatting rules to prevent missing data errors in the pricing segment. An item may contain up to fifteen of these discount percentage entries. Each provided value must be formatted as a decimal number and restricted to a length of at least one character but no more than five characters.

label: Steuerbetrag
description: When curating data for Invoice Details or individual Items, you are permitted to record a tax amount, but it is strictly limited to a maximum of one entry per record. Furthermore, any provided tax amount value must not exceed thirteen characters in length. Strict adherence to these limits is required to maintain compliance with the MOA+124 segment standards, as any violation or improper formatting will trigger a system error stating that the tax amount is incorrectly specified.

label: ZuschlagProzentsatz
description: When curating an Item record, you may specify up to fifteen charge percentage values to represent the percentage type and amount of a surcharge, which directly correspond to data elements 5245 or 5482 in the PCD segment. To ensure data integrity and prevent missing or invalid PCD segment errors, every provided charge percentage must be formatted as a floating-point decimal number and strictly constrained to a length of between one and five characters.

label: Prozesszugehoerigkeit
description: For an E-Invoice record, the data model enforces a strict process affiliation rule. Every E-Invoice must include exactly one belongs to process attribute, and the value for this specific attribute must be explicitly defined as the exact value "ProcessExample".

label: SteuerangabenItem
description: When curating details for an Invoice data or an individual Item, strict guidelines apply to the specification of tax information. Specifically, the VAT rate may be recorded up to a maximum of five times, and each individual tax rate entry must not exceed five characters in length. Adhering to these limits ensures the accuracy of the tax segment at both the specific item level, such as the SG 21 header part, and the overall totals level, preventing any incorrect specification of the tax rate within the business record.
